title: 05760_A_Study_of_Global_and_Episodic_Bonuses_for_Exploration_in_Contextual_MDPs
positive_examples: Efficient exploration reduces sample complexity, making real-world application more feasible.
Applications in video games, virtual reality, autonomous driving, robotics, and healthcare.
negative_examples: Exploration methods can potentially cause harm if deployed in the real world without appropriate safety measures.
Seeking out novel states may lead to unpredicted behavior.
